sections.paragraph:
to boil or bubble up as a fountain (so Syr.) and boiling Water (see מַרְחֶשֶׁת ). Arab. رخش V. VIII. to be moved, agitated. The primary idea appears to be in the noise made by water boiling, compare רָעַשׁ, רָחַץ. Metaph. followed by an acc. Psa 45:2, רָחַשׁ לִבִּי דָּבָר טֹוב “my heart boils up pleasant words.”

Derivative, מַרְחֶשֶׁת.
